saved_queries.name: Year that had highest total decisions
saved_queries.sql:
-- Year that had highest total decisions
SELECT
  decision_year,
  COUNT(*) AS total_decisions
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
WHERE decision_year BETWEEN 2022 AND 2026
GROUP BY decision_year
ORDER BY total_decisions DESC
LIMIT 1

saved_queries.name: Registry status breakdown (data sources configured vs. not)
saved_queries.sql:
-- Registry status breakdown (data sources configured vs. not)
SELECT
  registry_status,
  designation_wave,
  COUNT(*) AS municipality_count
FROM strong_mayor_municipalities
WHERE designation_status = 'designated'
GROUP BY registry_status, designation_wave
ORDER BY designation_wave, registry_status

saved_queries.name: Implementation status breakdown across all designated municipalities
saved_queries.sql:
-- Implementation status breakdown across all designated municipalities
SELECT
  implementation_status,
  COUNT(*) AS municipality_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct
FROM strong_mayor_municipalities
WHERE designation_status = 'designated'
GROUP BY implementation_status
ORDER BY municipality_count DESC

saved_queries.name: Top 5 decision types by municipality (pivot-style: municipality x type)
saved_queries.sql:
-- Top 5 decision types by municipality (pivot-style: municipality x type)
SELECT
  municipality_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'written_approval' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS written_approval,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'bylaw_approval' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bylaw_approval,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'directive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS directive,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'appointment' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS appointment,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision_type = 'veto_notice' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS veto_notice,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
GROUP BY municipality_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20

saved_queries.name: Directive decisions by municipality
saved_queries.sql:
-- Directive decisions by municipality
SELECT
  municipality_name,
  COUNT(*) AS directives
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
WHERE decision_type = 'directive'
GROUP BY municipality_name
ORDER BY directives DESC
LIMIT 15

saved_queries.name: Veto notices by municipality
saved_queries.sql:
-- Veto notices by municipality
SELECT
  municipality_name,
  COUNT(*) AS veto_notices
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
WHERE decision_type = 'veto_notice'
GROUP BY municipality_name
ORDER BY veto_notices DESC
LIMIT 15

saved_queries.name: Decision type breakdown overall
saved_queries.sql:
-- Decision type breakdown overall
SELECT
  decision_type,
  COUNT(*) AS total_decisions,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct_of_total
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
GROUP BY decision_type
ORDER BY total_decisions DESC

saved_queries.name: Decisions by municipality (top 20)
saved_queries.sql:
-- Decisions by municipality (top 20)
SELECT
  municipality_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_decisions
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
GROUP BY municipality_name
ORDER BY total_decisions DESC
LIMIT 20

saved_queries.name: Decisions by year filtered to 2025 expansion municipalities
saved_queries.sql:
-- Decisions by year filtered to 2025 expansion municipalities
SELECT
  d.decision_year,
  COUNT(*) AS decisions_2025_expansion
FROM strong_mayor_decisions d
JOIN strong_mayor_municipalities m ON d.municipality_name = m.municipality_name
WHERE m.designation_wave = '2025_expansion'
  AND d.decision_year BETWEEN 2022 AND 2026
GROUP BY d.decision_year
ORDER BY d.decision_year ASC

saved_queries.name: Decisions year over year (filtered to 2022-2026)
saved_queries.sql:
-- Decisions year over year (filtered to 2022-2026)
SELECT
  decision_year,
  COUNT(*) AS total_decisions
FROM strong_mayor_decisions
WHERE decision_year BETWEEN 2022 AND 2026
GROUP BY decision_year
ORDER BY decision_year ASC

saved_queries.name: Designated municipalities coverage progress
saved_queries.sql:
-- Designated municipalities coverage progress
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_designated_municipalities,
  SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ingested_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS municipalities_ingested,
  COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ingested_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS municipalities_remaining,
  ROUND(
    (COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ingested_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 /
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    1
  ) AS municipalities_remaining_pct
FROM strong_mayor_municipalities
WHERE designation_status = 'designated'
